payload.reason: FDM-D2E G005 requires a 4xH200 full-corpus/promotion run for recipe-faithful temporal masked-diffusion IDM evaluation; current production reservation API quota is 2 GPUs but project instructions require up to 4 H200 with utilization monitoring.
